heading: Penalty for having, possessing, or using liquor or property intended to be used in violating provisions of this chapter
label: 5686 Penalty for having, possessing, or using liquor or property intended to be used in violating provisions of this chapter
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5686, , , consisted in subsecs. (b) and (c) of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 700Pub. L. 85–859Prior section 5686(a) related to offenses as to operation of industrial alcohol or denaturing plants or unlawful withdrawal of taxable alcohol. See .section 5687 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5686, , , consisted in subsecs. (b) and (c) of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 700Pub. L. 85–859Prior section 5686(a) related to offenses as to operation of industrial alcohol or denaturing plants or unlawful withdrawal of taxable alcohol. See .section 5687 of this title

children.heading: General
children.label: a General
children.text: It shall be unlawful to have or possess any liquor or property intended for use in violating any provision of this chapter or regulations issued pursuant thereto, or which has been so used, and every person so having or possessing or using such liquor or property, shall be fined not more than $5,000, or imprisoned not more than 1 year, or both.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: b Cross reference
children.text: For seizure and forfeiture of liquor and property had, possessed, or used in violation of subsection (a), see section 7302.
